title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Incident Case: Net Static Default Routes
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net static default routes increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure and evaluate static and default routes with next-hop reachability, recursion, failover, and documentation.
Read connected, static, dynamic, default, and host routes and select the longest matching destination prefix.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
